violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach-in-coolers need cleaned of food debris.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Door seals on all coolers need cleaned of debris. Reach-in-Freezers need cleaned of debris.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities Floor on cook line was not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
